title: PHP if-else
codeExample:
<?php
$temp = 30;

if ($temp > 35) {
    echo "Very hot";
} elseif ($temp > 25) {
    echo "Warm";
} elseif ($temp > 15) {
    echo "Pleasant";
} else {
    echo "Cold";
}
?>

quiz.question: How many elseif blocks can you have in a single if statement?
Can you have multiple else blocks in a single if statement?
